evidence.text: Planet wars RTS game for AI agent evaluation # Planet Wars RTS The code is in early access, but the interfaces are intended to be stable both for the fully observable and partially observable versions of the game. To run headless games use the examples in the `games.planetwars.runners` package. To run games with a GUI, use the `games.planetwars.view.RunVisualGame` class.
